ground_truth.title: Founding Farmers Catering | Founding Farmers
ground_truth.main_content: Founding Farmers Co. Catering & Events offers off-site full-service event catering and drop-off catering. Our food, drink, and hospitality now goes beyond our restaurants to your home, office, and any venue of your choice. With Founding Farmers Co. Catering & Events, our team can help plan your event from start to finish, including customized menus, event design, service teams, bartenders, and more. We also offer drop-off catering for office events, parties, and beyond. For large parties and private dining at our restaurants, our restaurant teams are happy to plan your next event around our tables. We serve award-winning fried chicken and waffles.
with: Our food, drink, and hospitality now goes beyond our restaurants to your home, office, and any venue of your choice.
With Founding Farmers Co. Catering & Events, our team can help plan your event from start to finish, including customized menus, event design, service teams, bartenders, and more.
We also offer drop off catering for office events, parties, and beyond.
Looking to plan an event in one of our restaurants? Our restaurant teams are happy to plan your next event around our tables.
We serve award-winning fried chicken and waffles.
